subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is, verily, the Sovereign of verses and their Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لسلطان الایات و مطلعها و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @living waters; water of life, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
